description.p:
jadeterm is a terminal
it runs on your computer, or in a flatpak
it looks kinda in-place on your desktop, the plasma titlebar appears on plasma, it's libadw though
jadeterm isn't built by nazis, isn't "container native", isn't ugly as piss, doesn't have a million config options, etc
and i only used claude a little bit.
it's seriously just a terminal
